response: Headquartered in Austin, Texas, Acme Corp employs 342 people and generated a total annual revenue of $54.4 million, reflecting an 18% year-over-year growth. This full-year result was built on quarterly revenues of $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4.
